description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker image with a docker:dind service and logs into the GitLab Container Registry using docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY in a before_script. Define variables BRANCH_TAG as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_BUILD_REF_NAME and LATEST_TAG as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest, and a single stage named build. Add a build_all job in the build stage that runs docker build -t $BRANCH_TAG . then docker push $BRANCH_TAG. Add a build_master job in the build stage that only runs on the master branch and runs docker build -t $LATEST_TAG . then docker push $LATEST_TAG.
